intro: Between April 13 and April 30, 2026, ZCyberNews published 25 articles under the threat-intelligence tag, with GopherWhisper, Handala Hack, and LockBit among the most frequently observed threat actors. The coverage spanned government, technology, financial services, critical-infrastructure, and cybersecurity sectors, affecting regions including Asia, Europe, Iran, and North America. The severity mix comprised 11 informational, nine high, and three medium reports.
